## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Flutter app
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI / repository maintenance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Other

## Verification

- [ ] `make structure-check`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make format-check`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Manual run or screenshot added when relevant

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No real `.env` files
- [ ] No passwords, tokens, API keys, or recovery codes
- [ ] No real student data or personal documents
- [ ] No private screenshots
- [ ] Claims match the current experimental status of the project

## Notes

List known limitations, unfinished work, or follow-up tasks.
